description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build OSW-OS that runs on ubuntu-latest for all models. The workflow should trigger on workflow dispatch, push to any branch except when changes are made to *.md files or files within the scripts/screen_capture directory, and on pull requests to the master and develop branches. It checks if the workflow should be skipped based on duplicate actions. If not skipped, it checks out the repository and submodules, filters paths, determines languages and models to build using Python scripts, and then builds firmware for each language and model combination in debug and release configurations, caching pip and PlatformIO, and uploading firmware artifacts.
